title: File Upload & Management Flow

steps: DECISION: is $file a string? → YES: wrap as Base64Document(base64_encode($file), $mimeType)->as($name)
DECISION: is $file an UploadedFile? → YES: wrap as Base64Document::fromUpload($file)->as($name ?? originalName)
Call Ai::fakeableFileProvider($provider) → resolves FileProvider (real or FakeFileGateway)
HTTP POST multipart/form-data to provider API (attach 'file' part)
Dispatch FileStored(invocationId, provider, file, response) event
StoredDocument::content() reads via Storage::disk($disk)->get($path), throws RuntimeException if missing
Delegate to Files::put(StoredDocument, null, $name, $provider) → [follow FILES_PUT flow]

CAN_BE_UPLOADED_TO_PROVIDER_TRAIT.description: Trait used by Base64Document, LocalDocument, StoredDocument — allows file objects to upload themselves

CAN_BE_RETRIEVED_OR_DELETED_FROM_PROVIDE.description: Trait used by ProviderDocument, ProviderImage — allows provider-side file objects to retrieve or delete themselves

class_roles.Files: Static facade. Entry point for all file operations. Normalizes input types before delegating to FileProvider.
class_roles.Ai: Manager/registry. fakeableFileProvider() resolves named provider or returns FakeFileGateway when faking.
class_roles.ManagesFiles: Trait mixed into AnthropicProvider, OpenAiProvider, GeminiProvider. Implements FileProvider contract: wraps gateway calls with event dispatch and fake recording.
class_roles.FileGateway (interface): Contract: getFile(provider, fileId), putFile(provider, file), deleteFile(provider, fileId)
class_roles.FileProvider (interface): Contract: getFile(fileId), putFile(file), deleteFile(fileId), fileGateway(), useFileGateway()
class_roles.OpenAiFileGateway: Implements FileGateway. Uses OpenAI HTTP client. putFile POSTs with purpose='user_data'.
class_roles.AnthropicFileGateway: Implements FileGateway. Custom HTTP client with anthropic-beta header. Supports mime_type in getFile response.
class_roles.GeminiFileGateway: Implements FileGateway. Custom upload URL (/upload/v1beta/files). Normalizes fileId to 'files/{id}' prefix.
class_roles.PreparesStorableFiles: Trait on all gateways. prepareStorableFile() extracts [content, mimeType, name] from StorableFile.
class_roles.StorableFile (interface): Contract: content(): string, mimeType(): ?string, name(): ?string. Implemented by Base64Document, LocalDocument, StoredDocument.
class_roles.Base64Document: StorableFile from in-memory base64 data or UploadedFile. Uses CanBeUploadedToProvider.
class_roles.LocalDocument: StorableFile from filesystem path. Uses CanBeUploadedToProvider.
class_roles.StoredDocument: StorableFile from Laravel Storage disk. Uses CanBeUploadedToProvider.
class_roles.ProviderDocument: Holds provider-side file ID. Uses CanBeRetrievedOrDeletedFromProvider to get/delete.
class_roles.StoredFileResponse: Value object: id (provider file ID). Implements HasProviderId.

events_dispatched: FileStored(invocationId, provider, file, StoredFileResponse) — after successful upload
FileDeleted(invocationId, provider, fileId) — after successful delete
key_relationships: Files static facade delegates to Ai::fakeableFileProvider() which returns FileProvider
AnthropicProvider / OpenAiProvider / GeminiProvider implement FileProvider via ManagesFiles trait
ManagesFiles delegates to FileGateway (openai/anthropic/gemini-specific) for actual HTTP calls
All gateways use PreparesStorableFiles trait to extract [content, mime, name] from StorableFile
Base64Document / LocalDocument / StoredDocument implement StorableFile + use CanBeUploadedToProvider (calls back to Files::put)
ProviderDocument / ProviderImage use CanBeRetrievedOrDeletedFromProvider (calls back to Files::get / Files::delete)
ManagesFiles wraps every operation with event dispatch (StoringFile, FileStored, FileDeleted)
branching_conditions: Files::put/delete: Ai::filesAreFaked() → record upload/deletion for test assertions instead of real HTTP call
GeminiFileGateway: fileId already prefixed with 'files/' → skip prefix
StoredDocument::content(): file missing on disk → throw RuntimeException
LocalDocument::content(): file_get_contents returns false → throw RuntimeException
important_notes: ManagesFiles is the central trait that adds file management to providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini). It does NOT add the StorableFile upload trait to Document subclasses — those use CanBeUploadedToProvider separately. The CanBeRetrievedOrDeletedFromProvider trait is only on ProviderDocument/ProviderImage (objects that already have a provider-side ID). GeminiFileGateway uses a special upload URL prefix. AnthropicFileGateway is the only one returning mimeType in getFile.
